# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_templates (Data Source)

Used to retrieve all Public Cloud VM Instances templates (OS images) of the tenant.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all templates (OS images) of the tenant.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_templates" "all" {}

output "template_names" {
  value = [for t in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_templates.all.templates : t.name]
}

# Filter in HCL, e.g. only the Linux images.
output "linux_templates" {
  value = [
    for t in data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_templates.all.templates :
    t.name if t.os_family == "linux"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `availability_zone_id` (String) Filter templates by availability zone ID.
- `instance_family_id` (String) Filter templates by instance family ID.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `templates` (List of Object) The list of templates. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--templates))

<a id="nestedatt--templates"></a>
### Nested Schema for `templates`

Read-Only:

- `categories` (List of String)
- `compatible_families` (List of String)
- `description_en` (String)
- `disk_sizes_gb` (List of Number)
- `editor` (String)
- `family` (String)
- `icon` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `os_family` (String)
- `os_name` (String)
- `os_version` (String)
- `template_type` (String)
- `version` (String)
